title: astragalus monspessulanus subsp. illyricus
intro: Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. illyricus, also known as Illyrican milk-vetch or Illyrian milk-vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. illyricus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. illyricus is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to create infusions and salves.
